authors.author: Lothar Kosse
Lothar Kosse
Die ganze Welt ist voll von der Herrlichkeit des Herrn

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v2 v5 v4 v3 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Father Into Your courts I will enter Maker of heaven and earth I tremble In Your holy presence

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Glory Glory in Your sanctuary Splendor and majesty Lord Before You All life adores You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All the earth will declare That Your love is everywhere The fields will exalt, seas resound

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hear the trees' joyful cry Praising You and so will I A new song I'll sing Lord I will glorify and bless Your Holy Name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All the earth will declare That Your love is everywhere All the fields will exalt, seas resound

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hear the trees' joyful cry Praising You and so will I A new song I'll sing Lord I will glorify and bless Your Holy Name Glorify and bless Your Holy Name Glorify and bless Your Holy Name
